# Starmie Portable Selector V1

Default mode is off. This bundle is for Model B tiny live-smoke parity and safety-gated testing only.

Selected selector: `S5_LIGHTWEIGHT_SELECTOR`
Expected adapter: `starmie_selector_live_smoke_v1`

Required first step in Model B: run `parity_inputs.jsonl` against `starmie_selector_runtime.py` and compare to `parity_expected.jsonl`.

Do not build a submission or enable the selector by default from this bundle.
